ExtractionConfidence.description: The model's confidence in an extracted field (PRD §3.3).
ExtractionConfidence.title: ExtractionConfidence

description:
The audit record for one extracted field: which schema field, from which transcript span, at
what confidence, and whether the consultant accepted it. Persisted per field (PRD §3.3).

accepted.description: Set true when the consultant confirms this field (per-field).
accepted.title: Accepted

owner_consultant_id.description: The consultant who owns this resource. Data scoping is by this field, enforced in the repository layer and tested from day one.
owner_consultant_id.title: Owner Consultant Id

span_start.description: Character offset of the supporting span in the text.
span_start.title: Span Start

title: FieldProvenance
